items.titleZh: 在硬件法律战中，OpenAI 为 Codex 发布了售价 230 美元的键盘
items.titleEn: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
items.summaryZh: TechCrunch AI 报道了人工智能的产品开发。消息来源的要点：OpenAI 正与苹果就硬件贸易盗窃指控展开法律诉讼，该公司刚刚发布了一款发光键盘，旨在与其代理编码应用程序搭配使用。
items.summaryEn: TechCrunch AI reports a product development in AI. Key point from the source: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.
items.overviewZh: TechCrunch AI 发布了有关“在硬件法律斗争中，OpenAI 为 Codex 发布了 230 美元键盘”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: TechCrunch AI published a new update about “Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex”.

items.titleZh: NVIDIA 推出全新 Jetson Thor 计算机以推进主流机器人技术和边缘 AI
items.titleEn: NVIDIA Introduces New Jetson Thor Computers to Advance Mainstream Robotics and Edge AI
items.summaryZh: NVIDIA 博客报道了人工智能的行业发展。来源要点：通用机器人和自主机器正在从研究实验室转向现实世界的大众市场部署，创造了对紧凑、节能的人工智能超级计算机的需求
items.summaryEn: NVIDIA Blog reports an industry development in AI. Key point from the source: General-purpose robots and autonomous machines are moving from research labs to real-world mass-market deployment, creating demand for compact, power-efficient AI supercomputers ca
items.overviewZh: NVIDIA 博客发布了有关“NVIDIA 推出新型 Jetson Thor 计算机以推进主流机器人和边缘 AI”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: NVIDIA Blog published a new update about “NVIDIA Introduces New Jetson Thor Computers to Advance Mainstream Robotics and Edge AI”.

items.titleZh: OpenAI 终于为 Codex 推出了硬件
items.titleEn: OpenAI finally launches hardware… for Codex
items.summaryZh: The Verge AI 报道了人工智能领域的产品开发。来源要点：OpenAI 终于发布了一些硬件。

items.titleZh: 美国正在通过州和联邦行动推进人工智能安全
items.titleEn: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
items.summaryZh: OpenAI 博客报告了人工智能的政策发展。来源要点：OpenAI 概述了人工智能治理的“反向联邦制”方法，其中州法律帮助建立安全、民主人工智能的国家框架。
items.summaryEn: OpenAI Blog reports a policy development in AI. Key point from the source: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.
items.overviewZh: OpenAI 博客发布了有关“美国正在通过州和联邦行动推进人工智能安全”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: OpenAI Blog published a new update about “The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action”.
